description_long: This is a four-door sedan with a boxy, angular design reminiscent of late 20th-century vehicles. The exterior is finished in a deep reddish-brown color with a matte or semi-gloss appearance, and the windows are darkly tinted. The car features black trim around the windows and along the lower body, with side mirrors and door handles also in black. The front end displays dual round headlights and a simple grille, while the rear has rectangular taillights and a subtle bumper. The wheels are black with a multi-spoke design, and the overall proportions suggest a mid-sized passenger vehicle suitable for urban environments.
description: A boxy, reddish-brown four-door sedan with black trim, dark windows, and multi-spoke black wheels. It features dual round headlights and rectangular taillights.
description_view_0: Rear view showing rectangular taillights, a black bumper, and the trunk area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four-door layout, black trim, and multi-spoke wheels.
description_view_2: Front view displaying dual round headlights, a simple grille, and the hood.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the four-door configuration and wheel design.
attribute_wheel_design: Black wheels with a multi-spoke pattern, each wheel featuring numerous thin spokes radiating from the center.
